testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.0) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.0) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should capture http.url with the request path

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.0) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should capture the route pattern (not the actual path) for parameterized routes

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.0) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.1-rc.22) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.1-rc.22) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should capture http.url with the request path

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.1-rc.22) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should capture the route pattern (not the actual path) for parameterized routes

testcase.classname: Plugin nitro with h3 >=2 (2.0.1-rc.22) without configuration h3.request - request
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)
